TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pukpuk = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Pukpuk. 2,688 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 6,978 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 1,245 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 5,733 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 15%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Tayal 0.5%.
S.PHON: = pukpuk = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ pukpuk. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, bunun *.*%, tajal *.*%.
S.FORM: = Pukpuk = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Pukpuk. 2,688 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 6,978 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 18% niqan 1,245 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 82% niqan 5,733 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 15%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Tayal 0.5%.
S.PHON: = pukpuk = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ pukpuk. *,*** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tɾuku *%, bunun *.*%, tajal *.*%.
